docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, JUANA ANTONIA CHAVEZ AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, KRISTINE ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA BILLINGS SERVICES PLUS, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
